blocking_export_risks: The chromatin source art uses 46 curve fibers and 1240 bead instances merged into one bead mesh; direct export would be too dense for interactive Roblox use.
Curves must be converted, decimated, and split into LOD groups before import.
Nucleoplasm transparency may cause sorting issues around the chromatin in Roblox.
recommended_roblox_plan: Keep this Blender file as high-quality source art.
Create a medium LOD with fewer converted curves and a low LOD using baked texture cards or simplified ropes.
Make chromatin toggleable for educational inspection views.
